tool.name: coderet
tool.summary: Extract selected simple coding features and optionally translate them

sections.title: Overview
sections.content: `coderet` extracts simple coding-feature regions from annotated EMBL or GenBank records using the shared Epithema feature-selection and extraction seam. In v1 it defaults to CDS selection when no selector flags are supplied, and can optionally translate each extracted region with the standard genetic code.

sections.title: Inputs
sections.content: The current v1 tool accepts one annotated EMBL or GenBank input plus optional `--translate`, `--kind`, `--name`, `--qualifier`, and `--strand` flags. Feature selectors combine conjunctively when more than one is supplied. If no selector flags are present, `coderet` defaults conservatively to `--kind cds`.

sections.title: Outputs
sections.content: Without `--translate`, one nucleotide FASTA record is emitted per selected simple feature in stable source and feature order. With `--translate`, each extracted region is translated strictly in frame 1 and emitted as a protein FASTA record with a `.pep` identifier suffix.

sections.title: Current Status
sections.content: This method is implemented and exposed through `epithema coderet`. Rust tests currently cover default CDS extraction, strict translation, no-match handling through the shared feature-extraction seam, and service-layer invocation against committed annotated fixtures.

sections.title: Caveats
sections.content: The v1 scope supports only simple single-span feature locations. Joined or otherwise complex locations fail clearly through the shared feature-extraction layer. Translation is strict and does not attempt alternative codes, frame inference, or tolerant CDS repair.

artifacts.label: Annotated GenBank fixture
artifacts.description: Repository-managed annotated GenBank fixture used for deterministic coderet validation.

examples.title: Translate the default CDS selection
examples.description: Uses the default CDS selector and translates the extracted coding region into a protein FASTA record.

expected_outputs.label: Coding-feature-derived sequences
expected_outputs.description: One translated protein record is emitted for the CDS feature in the fixture.
